title: Foxy’s Cheating Game
description: The crew lands on a strange island of stretched animals and meets Tonjit before the Foxy Pirates interrupt the calm.
scene: Across pages 4, 5, 6, 7, this scene focuses on Luffy, Aokiji, Foxy, Nami, Usopp. The crew lands on a strange island of stretched animals and meets Tonjit before the Foxy Pirates interrupt the calm.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: It's because you painted a black stain...

dialogue.speaker: Aokiji
dialogue.text: Differing opinions can always be used...

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: ain't that one of the shichi- Buka!!?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: What's a guy like him doing here...?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: for weak under-lings, you little brats...!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Please... give me one more chance...!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: We'll follow you no matter what!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: I'll exterminate every pushover as needed,

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: To reach where you are some day!

summary: The crew lands on a strange island of stretched animals and meets Tonjit before the Foxy Pirates interrupt the calm.
